title: Molecular Spectroscopy: Probing Quantum States
description: Understand how molecules interact with electromagnetic radiation and how spectroscopy reveals molecular structure, bonding, and dynamics through quantum mechanical transitions.
learningObjectives: Explain the quantum mechanical basis of molecular spectroscopy
Distinguish between rotational, vibrational, and electronic spectroscopy
Calculate vibrational frequencies from force constants
Interpret IR and UV-Vis spectra in terms of molecular structure
Understand selection rules and their quantum mechanical origin
Connect spectroscopy to quantum chemistry calculations
